notes: Core pac-man mechanics are present but the maze rendering is poor (filled squares instead of proper wall outlines), ghost house/eye-return logic is buggy, the maze layout has issues with tunnel rows and empty padding rows visible, and the overall visual fidelity is far from the classic arcade look.
A very impressive and accurate Pac-Man clone with great ghost AI and audio, but it suffers from an infinite lives bug (lives are never decremented upon death).

A solid but clearly imperfect Pac-Man clone with workable core systems, though ghost/score state bugs, simplified visuals, and some likely runtime issues prevent it from feeling fully authentic or polished.
